name: GHA Runner VM Monitoring v5
description: CPU, memory, load, swap time-series metrics and build info for Bitrise GHA Mac runners

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT count(*) AS 'Builds' FROM GHABuildInfo WHERE runner_os = {{machine_type}} AND cpu_count = {{cpu_count}} AND workflow_name = {{workflow_name}} AND branch = {{branch}} AND repository = {{repository}} AND commit_author = {{commit_author}}

SELECT percentile(build_duration_seconds, 50) AS 'p50 (s)' FROM GHABuildInfo WHERE runner_os = {{machine_type}} AND cpu_count = {{cpu_count}} AND workflow_name = {{workflow_name}} AND branch = {{branch}} AND repository = {{repository}} AND commit_author = {{commit_author}}

SELECT percentile(build_duration_seconds, 90) AS 'p90 (s)' FROM GHABuildInfo WHERE runner_os = {{machine_type}} AND cpu_count = {{cpu_count}} AND workflow_name = {{workflow_name}} AND branch = {{branch}} AND repository = {{repository}} AND commit_author = {{commit_author}}

SELECT average(build_duration_seconds) AS 'avg (s)' FROM GHABuildInfo WHERE runner_os = {{machine_type}} AND cpu_count = {{cpu_count}} AND workflow_name = {{workflow_name}} AND branch = {{branch}} AND repository = {{repository}} AND commit_author = {{commit_author}}

SELECT percentile(build_duration_seconds, 50) AS 'p50 (s)', percentile(build_duration_seconds, 90) AS 'p90 (s)' FROM GHABuildInfo WHERE runner_os = {{machine_type}} AND cpu_count = {{cpu_count}} AND workflow_name = {{workflow_name}} AND branch = {{branch}} AND repository = {{repository}} AND commit_author = {{commit_author}} TIMESERIES 1 hour

widgets.title: Avg Build Duration by Machine Type

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT average(build_duration_seconds) AS 'avg (s)' FROM GHABuildInfo WHERE workflow_name = {{workflow_name}} AND branch = {{branch}} AND repository = {{repository}} AND commit_author = {{commit_author}} FACET runner_os

widgets.title: Avg Build Duration by vCPU Count

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT average(build_duration_seconds) AS 'avg (s)' FROM GHABuildInfo WHERE runner_os = {{machine_type}} AND workflow_name = {{workflow_name}} AND branch = {{branch}} AND repository = {{repository}} AND commit_author = {{commit_author}} FACET cpu_count

SELECT average(build_duration_seconds) AS 'avg (s)' FROM GHABuildInfo WHERE runner_os = {{machine_type}} AND cpu_count = {{cpu_count}} AND branch = {{branch}} AND repository = {{repository}} AND commit_author = {{commit_author}} FACET workflow_name

SELECT average(build_duration_seconds) AS 'avg (s)' FROM GHABuildInfo WHERE runner_os = {{machine_type}} AND cpu_count = {{cpu_count}} AND workflow_name = {{workflow_name}} AND repository = {{repository}} AND commit_author = {{commit_author}} FACET branch

widgets.title: Avg Build Duration by Commit Author

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT average(build_duration_seconds) AS 'avg (s)' FROM GHABuildInfo WHERE runner_os = {{machine_type}} AND cpu_count = {{cpu_count}} AND workflow_name = {{workflow_name}} AND branch = {{branch}} AND repository = {{repository}} FACET commit_author
SELECT average(gha.vm.cpu.user_pct) AS 'user %', average(gha.vm.cpu.system_pct) AS 'system %', average(gha.vm.cpu.idle_pct) AS 'idle %' FROM Metric WHERE runner.name = {{vm_name}} TIMESERIES AUTO

SELECT average(gha.vm.memory.used_mb) AS 'used MB', average(gha.vm.memory.cached_mb) AS 'cached MB', average(gha.vm.memory.free_mb) AS 'free MB' FROM Metric WHERE runner.name = {{vm_name}} TIMESERIES AUTO
SELECT average(`gha.vm.load.1m`) AS 'load 1m', average(`gha.vm.load.5m`) AS 'load 5m', average(`gha.vm.load.15m`) AS 'load 15m' FROM Metric WHERE runner.name = {{vm_name}} TIMESERIES AUTO
SELECT average(gha.vm.swap.used_mb) AS 'used MB', average(gha.vm.swap.free_mb) AS 'free MB' FROM Metric WHERE runner.name = {{vm_name}} TIMESERIES AUTO

nrqlQuery.query: SELECT uniques(runner.name) FROM Metric SINCE 1 week ago
SELECT uniques(github.repository) FROM Metric SINCE 1 week ago
SELECT uniques(runner.os) FROM Metric SINCE 1 week ago
SELECT uniques(runner.cpu_count) FROM Metric SINCE 1 week ago
SELECT uniques(github.workflow) FROM Metric SINCE 1 week ago
SELECT uniques(github.branch) FROM Metric SINCE 1 week ago
SELECT uniques(commit_author) FROM GHABuildInfo SINCE 1 week ago
